issue_summary: fix NPE in AnalyzingSuggester when there are too many graph expansions
javadoc_before: /** * Returns the set of accepted strings, assuming that at most * limit strings are accepted. If more than limit * strings are accepted, null is returned. If limit<0, then * the limit is infinite. */
javadoc_after: /** * Returns the set of accepted strings, assuming that at most * limit strings are accepted. If more than limit * strings are accepted, the first limit strings found are returned. If limit<0, then * the limit is infinite. */
